creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jens Grassel from comment #2)
> I'm fine with that.
Good, I'll commit it. Thanks :)

> Is there anything special I have to know when becoming a maintainer?
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/contributing/ports-contributing.html#maintain-port
has an overview of what it means to be a port maintainer.
